case_title: PEDRO COMUNIDAD VS. PERRY KING MAYORGA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMUNIDAD, PEDRO AS TO DEFENDANT MAYORGA, PERRY KING ,AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMUNIDAD, PEDRO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAYORGA, PERRY KING ,AN INDIVIDUAL $8,635.19 PRINCIPAL, $3,042.42 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,902.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
